## Runtime namespace

## Classes

<table><thead><tr><th>

Class


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[RuntimeContext](./ts-chocolate.runtime.runtimecontext.md)


</td><td>

Full runtime context with session creation capabilities.

Extends LibraryRuntimeContext with the ability to create editing sessions for filling recipes. This is the primary entry point for consumers who need both library resolution and session management.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

## Interfaces

<table><thead><tr><th>

Interface


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[IRuntimeContext](./ts-chocolate.runtime.iruntimecontext.md)


</td><td>

Full runtime context interface with session capabilities.

Extends ILibraryRuntimeContext with: - Session creation methods - Confection access and caching

This is the complete entry point for consumers who need both library resolution and session management.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IRuntimeContextCreateParams](./ts-chocolate.runtime.iruntimecontextcreateparams.md)


</td><td>

Parameters for creating a RuntimeContext with a new library


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ISessionContext](./ts-chocolate.runtime.isessioncontext.md)


</td><td>

Context interface for session creation. Extends IConfectionContext with the ability to create filling editing sessions.

This interface is used by confection editing sessions to manage filling scaling.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
